allow: PowerShell($url = "https://github.com/tporadowski/redis/releases/download/v5.0.14/Redis-x64-5.0.14.zip"; $out = "$env:TEMP\\redis.zip"; Write-Output "Downloading Redis from $url ..."; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Download complete: $out")
